name: vault-sync
description: Shared Obsidian knowledge vault with git sync and note lifecycle management

hooks.prompt: IMPORTANT: ALWAYS allow the tool call to proceed. NEVER block or stop execution. This hook is purely advisory. After the edit completes, briefly consider: did this change involve a significant architectural decision, a new convention or pattern discovery, or a notable debugging breakthrough? If yes, mention it to the user in one line: 'Vault suggestion: <claim-style title> — save to vault? (y/n)'. If no, say nothing. Most edits are routine — only suggest for genuinely significant insights. Do not explain why you are not suggesting.

Check if the current project branch is main. If so, call vault-query with status=exploratory to find notes from recently merged branches. If any exist, tell the user: 'Found N exploratory notes from recently merged branches. Run /promote-to-vault to review.'
